prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan L28ET (2.8L inline-6, iron block, aluminum head) with a forged crankshaft (Nissan Motorsports P/N 12010-A4200) and forged JE Pistons (12.5:1 compression, P/N 283050) paired with Eagle H-beam connecting rods (P/N CRS5800HB). Turbocharged with a Garrett GT35R (P/N 709999-5002S) on a custom tubular manifold (JUN Auto P/N JUN-L28ET-MANIFOLD) with 38mm external wastegate (TurboSmart CompGate40 P/N TS-0505-1002).

Fuel system upgrade with dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps (P/N 0 580 254 956), Injector Dynamics ID1000 injectors (P/N ID1000-6), and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU (P/N HT-151301) with custom L28ET base maps and flex-fuel capability. Intercooled with a GReddy Type-S intercooler (P/N 12002101) and 3-inch aluminum piping.

Drivetrain reinforcement with a Nissan Motorsports OS Giken twin-plate clutch (P/N 226G0-OSG) and OS Giken Super Lock differential (P/N OS G-280SL). Transmission upgraded to a Z32 5-speed manual (P/N 32000-31U00) with a Nismo short shifter (P/N 32600-40P00) and upgraded synchros (Nismo P/N 32200-40P00).
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Z31 widebody kit (Pandem P/N RB-Z31-V2) with custom carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser (Seibon Carbon P/N CF-Z31-SPLITTER).

OEM+ restomod with Z31 Turbo 2-tone paint (Nissan Racing Red P/N 314 and Pearl White P/N QX1) with custom gold pinstriping by Kamei Auto. Retains factory digital dash but with a modernized gauge cluster (Defi Advance BF P/N DF13501) in the center console.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (P/N DFV 2211-10) and polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension P/N 7.5108G). Wheel setup: Work Meister S1 3P 16x9.5 +15 front and 16x11 +20 rear (P/N 1695R16) with Toyo R888R tires (245/45/16 front, 295/40/16 rear).
